findings.description: PascalCase class `RequestPathJavaPackageMapping` appears in both the production and test XML configuration examples in the source but is absent from s3 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `<component name="requestPathJavaPackageMapping" class="nablarch.fw.handler.RequestPathJavaPackageMapping">` appears in both the 本番用設定例 and テスト用設定 code blocks.
